{{# @name Livewire collection — tours @desc Tours grid for /tours, rendered by reach/statamic-livewire-filters. Each entry uses the shared `components/tour-card` partial so the /tours grid and the homepage featured-tours carousel stay visually consistent. When the active filters return zero entries the grid is replaced by an inline empty state — "Reset filters" calls the LivewireCollection's `clearAll` method, which fires `clear-all-filters` to every filter component on the page. #}}
{{ if entries }}
{{ entries }}
{{ partial:components/tour-card }}
{{ /entries }}
{{ links }}
{{ else }}
{{ svg src="icons/trekking-binoculars" attr:class="size-12 fill-current" attr:aria-hidden="true" attr:role="img" }}
{{ partial:typography/h3 content="No tours match those filters" color="text-foreground" class="!m-0 text-center" }}

Try changing or removing some of your filters.

{{ /if }}
